rationale: Response makes high-stakes attribution and legal/security claims (Sandworm/GRU Unit 74455, Title 50 activation, confirmed nation-state intrusion) with zero caveats, no sources, and no calibrated uncertainty from a single ambiguous indicator.
rubric_evidence: The incident was a coordinated cyberattack carried out by Sandworm (GRU Unit 74455).
treating this as a confirmed nation-state intrusion
